description_long: This object is a vintage-style shotgun with a short, thick barrel and a robust wooden body. The barrel appears to be made of dark, possibly blued or aged metal, with some ornate engravings or decorative elements along its length. The stock is a twisted, carved wooden handle, ending in a rounded pommel, giving it a distinctive and somewhat antique appearance. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, with the guard being rounded and slightly elongated. The overall design suggests a single-barrel configuration, with no visible pump or lever mechanisms. The shotgun's compact size and ornate details make it stand out as a unique weapon, likely intended for close-quarters use or as a collector's piece.
description: A compact, ornately carved shotgun with a twisted wooden handle and a short, engraved metal barrel. The design is vintage and robust, with a rounded trigger guard and no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed head-on from the muzzle, showing the circular barrel opening and the rounded end of the twisted wooden handle.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the ornate engravings on the barrel, the twisted wooden handle, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the shotgun, focusing on the end of the handle and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the shotgun's profile, emphasizing the carved wooden handle, the short barrel, and the trigger guard's shape.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with visible engravings and no ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: no stock, features a twisted wooden handle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated, medium size, with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
